channel.title: Software Engineering on
channel.description: Recent content in Software Engineering on

item.title: k9s
item.description: A powerful terminal UI for Kubernetes that makes managing clusters feel fast, intuitive, and actually enjoyable.

item.title: n8n
item.description: The best visual workflow automation editor that connects to almost everything.

item.title: sqlmap
item.description: Automatic SQL injection and database takeover tool.

item.title: PostgREST
item.description: Automagically generate a production-ready REST APIs from any PostgreSQL database.

item.title: 6 Steps to Create and Publish a Modern Javascript and Typescript Library in 2024
item.description: All you need to create and share your Javascript or Typescript library with the Open-source community.

item.title: 7 Ways You Can Contribute to Open-source Projects
item.description: There are several ways to contribute to open-source projects, even if you are not a developer.
